topic: Best AI Meeting Assistants in 2026: Otter.ai vs Fireflies.ai vs Supernormal

competitors.title: Best AI Meeting Assistants in 2026: Tested and Compared
key_points: Fireflies.ai: All‑rounder with deep CRM integration, Super Search across all transcripts, customizable post‑meeting workflows
Otter.ai: Native integrator with best‑in‑class real‑time transcription, Otter AI Chat, direct Zoom/Microsoft Teams integration
Avoma: Insight powerhouse offering conversation analytics, talk‑to‑listen ratios, sentiment tracking, competitor mention detection
Grain: Lightweight champion focused on highlight reels and video clips, deep LinkedIn Sales Navigator integration
AudioScribe: Budget‑friendly file‑based workflow for individuals and small teams, accurate transcription at competitive price

competitors.title: Best AI Meeting Assistants 2026: Otter.ai vs Fireflies.ai vs tl;dv vs Fathom
key_points: Otter.ai pricing: Free (300 min/month), Pro $17/month (1200 min), Business $30/user/month (6000 min)
Fireflies.ai excels at CRM integration, auto‑record, 90+ language transcription, smart search
tl;dv offers generous free tier, video clip creation, multi‑language support, timestamps
Fathom provides free core features, instant summaries, CRM sync with Salesforce/HubSpot, secure storage

competitors.title: Best AI Meeting Assistant 2026 — I Tested Otter, Fireflies, and 6 Others
key_points: Fathom: Best for most people with unlimited free meetings, excellent summary quality, 85‑90% action item accuracy
Fireflies.ai: Best for teams with cross‑meeting search, 40+ integrations, shared meeting intelligence
Otter.ai: Best real‑time transcription with live captions, speaker ID, live summaries visible to all participants
Grain: Best for sales teams with AI coaching scorecards, deal intelligence, Salesforce bidirectional sync

stats.fact: AI‑powered meeting assistants market size grows from $3.14 billion in 2025 to $3.91 billion in 2026 at a CAGR of 24.6%
stats.source: Research and Markets AI‑Powered Meeting Assistants Market Report 2026

stats.fact: AI Meeting Assistants Market valued at USD 3.52 billion in 2026, projected to reach USD 7.33 billion by 2035 at 8.5% CAGR
stats.source: Global Growth Insights AI Meeting Assistants Market Size Report

stats.fact: Average knowledge worker spends 21 hours per week in meetings; AI assistants can save significant time on note‑taking and follow‑ups

angles: Which AI meeting assistant is best for your team size? Solo professionals, small teams, or enterprise
Free vs paid: Is Fathom's unlimited free tier enough, or do you need Fireflies/Otter paid features?
Real‑time transcription vs post‑meeting analysis: Otter.ai for live accuracy vs Fireflies.ai for cross‑meeting search
Sales teams need CRM integration: Grain vs Fireflies for sales‑specific features
outline: Introduction: The rise of AI meeting assistants in 2026
Market overview: Size, growth, and key drivers
Key features to look for in an AI meeting assistant
Comparison of top tools: Otter.ai, Fireflies.ai, Fathom, Grain, Avoma, tl;dv
Pricing comparison: Free tiers vs paid plans
Use case recommendations: Solo professionals, small teams, sales teams, large organizations
Future trends: Proactive assistants, multimodal analysis, personalized knowledge repositories
Conclusion: How to choose the right tool for your workflow
